name: qidi-printer-mcp
summary: QIDI 3D Printer MCP server. Controls QIDI 4 Max Combo via Moonraker REST API. Tools: printer status, temperatures, start/pause/resume/cancel print, list files, send gcode, preheat. Built by MEOK AI Labs.
